name: PUFloatingButton
description: Contextual action buttons that float above the map. Two variants: a circular icon button for single actions (e.g. navigate to location) and a pill button for labelled actions (e.g. Add WiFi).

props.name: variant
props.description: icon = 56×56px circle | pill = icon + label side by side

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon to display inside the button

props.name: label
props.description: Text label shown beside the icon (pill variant only). Also used as accessibilityLabel on icon variant.

props.name: dark
props.description: Dark surface — switches to navy background with subtle border

size.pill: 56px height, auto-width to fit icon + label

accessibility.notes: icon variant requires label prop for accessibility even though label is not visually rendered
